stemHtml: What is true about visa requirements in case of a force majeure (natural disaster)?

options.a: Contracting States shall require visas from all passengers.
options.b: Contracting States shall require visas from passengers and a Crew Member Certificate (CMC) from the crew.
options.c: Contracting States shall not require visas from passengers.
options.d: Both passengers and crew shall be allowed to enter without visa.
